mapper.sql: select stage_id, ai_task_id, run_id, workflow_task_id, workflow_task_no, stage_code, stage_instance_id, stage_name, stage_status, agent_name, start_time, end_time, duration_ms, stage_summary, stage_detail, output_json, error_message, sort_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from audit_ai_flow_stage
mapper.select: select run_id from audit_ai_flow_stage where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId} order by create_time desc, stage_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into audit_ai_flow_stage ( ai_task_id, run_id, workflow_task_id, workflow_task_no, stage_code, stage_instance_id, stage_name, stage_status, agent_name, start_time, end_time, duration_ms, stage_summary, stage_detail, output_json, error_message, sort_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{aiTaskId}, #{runId}, #{workflowTaskId}, #{workflowTaskNo}, #{stageCode}, #{stageInstanceId}, #{stageName}, #{stageStatus}, #{agentName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMs}, #{stageSummary}, #{stageDetail}, #{outputJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{sortNum}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )

insert into audit_ai_flow_stage ( ai_task_id, run_id, workflow_task_id, workflow_task_no, stage_code, stage_instance_id, stage_name, stage_status, agent_name, start_time, end_time, duration_ms, stage_summary, stage_detail, output_json, error_message, sort_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values
( #{item.aiTaskId}, #{item.runId}, #{item.workflowTaskId}, #{item.workflowTaskNo}, #{item.stageCode}, #{item.stageInstanceId}, #{item.stageName}, #{item.stageStatus}, #{item.agentName}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.durationMs}, #{item.stageSummary}, #{item.stageDetail}, #{item.outputJson}, #{item.errorMessage}, #{item.sortNum}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate(), #{item.updateBy}, sysdate() )
